response.justification: The candidate is a capable senior engineer with a strong track record in full-stack web and general software development, but lacks the three mandatory requirements for this role: only ~6 months of professional C++ experience against a 5–10 year requirement, no demonstrated expertise in SQL Server/Oracle (background is primarily NoSQL), and critically, zero capital markets or financial services domain exposure. While their communication skills and DevOps knowledge are strengths, the gap between required and demonstrated experience in the core technical and domain competencies is too significant to justify an interview.
strengths: 10+ years of senior-level software development with proven ability to master diverse technology stacks across web, mobile, and embedded systems
Strong communication and mentoring abilities demonstrated through public talks, workshops, and open-source community contributions
Solid CI/CD, DevOps, and infrastructure knowledge with hands-on experience in deploy pipelines, Docker, and GitLab administration
concerns: Only ~6 months of documented professional C++ experience (Dec 2014–June 2015 at National Instruments) against the mandatory 5–10 year requirement
No evidence of SQL Server or Oracle expertise; background shows MongoDB and MySQL focus with no financial database systems experience
Complete absence of capital markets, fixed income, investment banking, or financial services domain knowledge—would require multi-year domain onboarding

key_factors.factor: Database Platform Gap (Oracle/SQL Server vs. NoSQL focus)
